LanguageData.VQE_LifespanYears.label: lifespan (years)
LanguageData.VQE_LifespanYears.description: The operational lifespan of the drone in years.
LanguageData.VQE_LifespanDrainSpeed.label: lifespan drain speed
LanguageData.VQE_LifespanDrainSpeed.description: Multiplies how quickly the drone's lifespan drains. Higher values mean faster drain.
